Description: Verify application launches successfully
Test Steps:
1. Start application server
2. Check application logs
3. Access application URL
Expected Result: Application starts without errors and homepage loads

Description: Verify database connection is established
Test Steps:
1. Start application
2. Check database connection logs
3. Perform simple query
Expected Result: Database connection is successful

Description: Verify login page renders correctly
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to application URL
2. Check page elements
Expected Result: Login page loads with email password fields and login button

Description: Verify user can login
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid credentials
2. Click login
Expected Result: User logs in successfully

Description: Verify dashboard renders after login
Test Steps:
1. Complete login
2. Wait for dashboard
Expected Result: Dashboard loads with navigation and widgets

Description: Verify all navigation menu items are accessible
